model_specification_line: model = smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment + C(year) + birthyr', data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC3')
sample_selection: yrimmig between 1900 and 2007, age between 18 and 45, perwt > 0 to focus on working-age migrants
arrival_age (yrimmig - birthyr) must be non-missing and between 0 and 60 so we can classify DACA eligibility
